name: Strix — autonomous AI pentest agent
description: Imports findings from Strix (github.com/usestrix/strix), the open-source autonomous AI hacking agent. Strix runs AI agents that dynamically test a codebase, GitHub repo, web app or API like real pentesters — exploiting issues and validating them with a proof-of-concept (IDOR/auth bypass, SQL/NoSQL/command injection, SSRF/XXE/insecure deserialization, XSS/prototype pollution, business-logic flaws, JWT/session weaknesses, misconfigurations) — and writes results to strix_runs/<run-name>/. This connector parses the Strix findings JSON: the assessed target becomes an ASSET and each validated finding a VULNERABILITY / ASSETVULNERABILITY (severity from the finding, vuln class / CWE and PoC in the description). Apache-2.0. Offline: pass `file` = a Strix findings JSON, or run with the bundled sample.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A Strix findings JSON (from strix_runs/<run>/) to parse

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Asset name to attach the findings to (default: derived from the Strix run)
